limitations: Records are tool-level staging evidence, not official university conclusions.
Do not infer named tool availability from generic AI policy language.
snapshotHash values in this staging file are SHA-256 hashes of the captured evidence snippets; canonical ingestion should replace them with full source snapshot hashes.
Official tool tables/directories are split one explicit row at a time; nested provider/model mentions inside platform descriptions are not promoted to allowed tool records by default.
Future-dated access commitments are represented as conditionally_allowed with the access timing preserved in howToObtain.

evidence.sourceTitle: HKUGenAI Tools - Information Technology Services
evidence.evidenceSnippet: HKUGenAI Tools | HKU ChatGPT Web App | Staff and students can use selected large-language models for teaching, learning, work and research-related purposes; staff have unlimited requests per day except gpt-5.5, and students receive a monthly token quota.

records.description: HKU-hosted chat interface for selected large-language models, limited to teaching, learning, work and research-related purposes.
records.howToObtain: Use HKU ChatGPT Web App with HKU access; staff and students receive quota-based access.
records.costToUser: Included within HKU quotas; self-pay subscription may increase quota for some services.

evidence.sourceTitle: HKUGenAI Tools - Information Technology Services
evidence.evidenceSnippet: HKUGenAI Tools | HKU DALL∙E Web App | Staff and students can use image generation models including gpt-image and Gemini image models; staff have up to 70 requests per week and students use the monthly token quota.

records.description: HKU-hosted image generation web app using selected image generation models.
records.howToObtain: Use HKU DALL∙E Web App with HKU access; staff and students receive quota-based access.
records.costToUser: Included within HKU quotas; self-pay subscription may increase quota for some services.

evidence.sourceTitle: HKUGenAI Tools - Information Technology Services
evidence.evidenceSnippet: HKUGenAI Tools | API Developer Portal (Staff) and API Developer Portal (Student) | HKU ITS provides API access to selected large-language, embedding, and image generation models powered by Microsoft Azure and Google Vertex AI services.

records.description: HKU ITS developer API access for selected LLM, embedding, and image-generation services.
records.howToObtain: Use the HKU ITS Developer Portal for staff or student API products.
records.costToUser: Quota-based access; self-pay subscription may increase quota for some services.

evidence.sourceTitle: Empowering students to thrive in the age of AI | NTU Singapore
evidence.evidenceSnippet: From August 2026, NTU will give all undergraduates full access to a suite of premium Google AI tools, such as Gemini Enterprise, Google AI Studio, and Vertex AI.

records.description: Premium Google AI chat and assistant capability for NTU undergraduates.
records.howToObtain: Planned full undergraduate access from August 2026.
records.costToUser: Not specified; NTU states students will receive access and computing credits.

evidence.sourceTitle: Tsinghua's student AI growth assistant 'Xiaoda'

evidence.sourceTitle: GenAI tools - The University of Melbourne

records.howToObtain: Access SparkAI through the University Spark portal; staff and graduate researchers are named audience.

evidence.sourceTitle: GenAI tools - The University of Melbourne
evidence.evidenceSnippet: All staff and students have access to Copilot (Web). Staff users who want to access Copilot (Work) will need to purchase an additional license through their local area.

records.howToObtain: All staff and students have access to Copilot Web; Copilot Work requires additional local-area license.
records.costToUser: Copilot Web not specified; Copilot Work requires purchase of additional license.

evidence.sourceTitle: GenAI tools - The University of Melbourne
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Zoom AI Companion provides automated summaries and actionable insights during Zoom meetings; users can enable AI companion for meetings they host.

evidence.sourceTitle: Using AI in university | Current Students - UNSW Sydney
evidence.evidenceSnippet: UNSW student AI guidance says: Protect personal information. Do not include personal or sensitive information in prompts. For data privacy and protection, use Microsoft Copilot using your UNSW account.

records.description: UNSW-recommended Copilot use path for data privacy and protection when using AI in study contexts.
records.howToObtain: Use Microsoft Copilot with your UNSW account; acceptable use varies by course and assessment rules.
